ledger.claim: The drawer tracks the opening gesture continuously.
ledger.expected: The drawer remains attached to the gesture.
ledger.observed: The drawer remained attached in all fixture runs.

ledger.claim: The confirmation renders above the drawer host.
ledger.expected: The confirmation host is above the drawer portal.
ledger.observed: The confirmation is mounted beneath the native modal host.

ledger.claim: People understand the drawer action labels.

ledger.studyQuestion: Can target participants predict the result of each drawer action?
